case_title: RUTHANNE SHPINER VS. SUPERSHUTTLE OF SAN FRANCISCO,INC. et al

docket_entries.description: REMOVED FROM ARBITRATION. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON MAR-19-2004 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212 FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. IF FILED, APPEARANCES ARE WAIVED. JAN-20-2004 ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR JEROME MARKS.
